Toolbar.LinkedItemsInPERT.Label: Show/Hide Linked items in PERT View
Toolbar.LinkedItemsInPERT.ToolTip.ShortH: Toggles the visibility of implemented item tiles for the operation
Toolbar.LinkedItemsInPERT.ToolTip.LongHe: Shows or hides the implemented item tiles linked to the operation. When enabled, the implemented items appear under the operation; when disabled, they are hidden.
Toolbar.LinkedResourcesInPERT.Label: Show/Hide Linked resources in PERT View
Toolbar.LinkedResourcesInPERT.ToolTip.Sh: Toggles the visibility of linked resources tiles for the operation
Toolbar.LinkedResourcesInPERT.ToolTip.Lo: Shows or hides the reosources tiles linked to the operation. When enabled, the linked resources appear under the operation; when disabled, they are hidden.
